headline: Robinhood backs push to scrap a market rule most traders don't know exists
summary: The SEC has proposed rescinding a little-known rule meant to stop the market from skipping the best stock price investors can actually see.

raw.headline: Robinhood backs push to scrap a market rule most traders don't know exists

headline: Is Robinhood Markets Stock Outperforming the S&P 500?
summary: While Robinhood Markets has outpaced the S&P 500 Index over the past year, analysts are cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
